name: Patient 40
history: Recent move and settling stress. Difficult relationship with judgmental, emotionally unsupportive mother. Strained friendships contributing to isolation.
helpless_belief: I am trapped in family patterns
unlovable_belief: I am bound to be alone
intermediate_belief: No one truly understands or accepts me.
intermediate_belief_depression: I'll always feel alone, even with people around me.
coping_strategies: Emotional withdrawal, superficial interactions, over-sharing followed by regret.
situation: Preparing for conversation with mother and expecting it to be challenging and superficial.
auto_thought: "She'll just criticize or give useless advice. We'll talk but not connect. It's pointless."
behavior: Prepares talking points, practices neutral responses, plans to end call at exactly 30 minutes.
